properties.name: nubian.agent.enabled
properties.description: Enable Nubian agent Spring Boot auto-configuration.

properties.name: nubian.agent.runtime.enabled
properties.description: Enable runtime beans such as the default DBConnection and ToolRegistry when nubian-runtime is on the classpath.

properties.name: nubian.agent.sandbox.enabled
properties.description: Enable sandbox core auto-configuration when nubian-sandbox is on the classpath.

properties.name: nubian.agent.memory.enabled
properties.description: Enable memory services when nubian-memory is on the classpath.

properties.name: nubian.agent.subagents.enabled
properties.description: Enable subagent task services when nubian-subagents is on the classpath.

properties.name: nubian.agent.agent-runs.enabled
properties.description: Enable agent run controller, service, and built-in run tools when nubian-agent-runs is on the classpath.

properties.name: nubian.agent.conversation.enabled
properties.description: Enable conversation services and REST endpoints when nubian-conversation is on the classpath.

properties.name: nubian.agent.timeline.enabled
properties.description: Enable run timeline services and REST endpoints when nubian-timeline is on the classpath.

properties.name: nubian.agent.sources.enabled
properties.description: Enable source and citation services when nubian-sources is on the classpath.

properties.name: nubian.agent.artifacts.enabled
properties.description: Enable artifact storage services and REST endpoints when nubian-artifacts is on the classpath.

properties.name: nubian.agent.collaboration.enabled
properties.description: Enable collaboration share and invite services when nubian-collaboration is on the classpath.

properties.name: nubian.agent.billing.enabled
properties.description: Enable billing services and REST endpoints when nubian-billing is on the classpath.

properties.name: nubian.agent.browser.enabled
properties.description: Enable browser automation services when nubian-browser is on the classpath.

properties.name: nubian.agent.identity-security.enabled
properties.description: Enable identity and Spring Security beans when nubian-identity-security is on the classpath.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.provider
properties.description: Default sandbox provider id used by the sandbox registry when multiple providers are registered.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.tools.auto-register
properties.description: Automatically register sandbox SPI beans with the sandbox registry.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.tools.auto-registration-enabled
properties.description: Automatically register discovered sandbox capabilities with the Nubian runtime tool registry when the sandbox tool registrar is active.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.tools.invocation-timeout-seconds
properties.description: Timeout in seconds for sandbox capability tool invocations.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.local.enabled
properties.description: Enable the local development sandbox provider when nubian-sandbox-local is on the classpath.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.docker.enabled
properties.description: Enable the Docker CLI sandbox provider when nubian-sandbox-docker is on the classpath. Also enabled when nubian.sandbox.provider is docker or docker-cli.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.docker.binary
properties.description: Docker CLI binary name used by the Docker sandbox provider.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.daytona.enabled
properties.description: Enable the Daytona sandbox provider bridge when nubian-sandbox-daytona is on the classpath. Also enabled when nubian.sandbox.provider is daytona.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.firecracker.enabled
properties.description: Enable the Firecracker sandbox provider when nubian-sandbox-firecracker is on the classpath. Also enabled when nubian.sandbox.provider is firecracker.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.firecracker.api-base-url
properties.description: FlyVM REST control-plane base URL used for /v1/computers lifecycle calls.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.firecracker.direct-no-vnc-url
properties.description: Optional direct noVNC viewer URL used by the UI instead of the FlyVM REST noVNC proxy.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.firecracker.api-key
properties.description: FlyVM API key sent as X-Api-Key for REST lifecycle calls.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.firecracker.bearer-token
properties.description: FlyVM bearer token sent as Authorization for REST lifecycle calls. When set, this overrides dev JWT minting.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.firecracker.jwt-secret
properties.description: Development-only HS256 secret used to mint short-lived FlyVM bearer tokens when bearer-token is not set.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.firecracker.jwt-issuer
properties.description: Issuer claim used for development FlyVM JWT minting.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.firecracker.jwt-audience
properties.description: Audience claim used for development FlyVM JWT minting.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.firecracker.jwt-tenant-id
properties.description: Tenant id used as the sub claim for development FlyVM JWT minting.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.firecracker.jwt-tier
properties.description: Tier claim used for development FlyVM JWT minting.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.firecracker.jwt-query-limit
properties.description: Query limit claim used for development FlyVM JWT minting.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.firecracker.jwt-ttl
properties.description: Time-to-live for development FlyVM JWTs minted by the adapter.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.firecracker.region
properties.description: Optional FlyVM computer region sent to POST /v1/computers.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.firecracker.required-provider
properties.description: Optional required provider sent to POST /v1/computers.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.firecracker.memory-mib
properties.description: Default FlyVM computer memory allocation.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.firecracker.vcpu
properties.description: Default FlyVM computer vCPU allocation.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.firecracker.data-disk-mib
properties.description: Default FlyVM computer data disk allocation.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.firecracker.repair-no-vnc-proxy
properties.description: Run the compatibility in-guest noVNC repair command during session startup. Keep disabled when FlyVM public REST/WebSocket proxy is available.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.persistence.sqlite.enabled
properties.description: Enable SQLite-backed sandbox session and event persistence when the SQLite module is on the classpath.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.persistence.sqlite.path
properties.description: SQLite database file path for sandbox session and event persistence.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.security.enabled
properties.description: Enable sandbox security policy checks.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.security.allow-privileged-docker
properties.description: Allow Docker sandbox sessions to request privileged containers.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.security.allowed-docker-images
properties.description: Optional allowlist of Docker image references. Empty means any non-malformed image is allowed.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.security.denied-commands
properties.description: Command prefixes denied by the default sandbox policy.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.security.denied-operations
properties.description: Sandbox operation types denied by the default sandbox policy.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.security.denied-path-prefixes
properties.description: Path prefixes denied by the default sandbox policy.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.security.denied-environment-keys
properties.description: Environment variable names denied by the default sandbox policy.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.security.allow-public-ports
properties.description: Allow sandbox sessions to expose public ports.

properties.name: nubian.sandbox.security.max-command-timeout-seconds
properties.description: Maximum allowed command timeout in seconds. Zero means no policy cap.

properties.name: nubian.supabase.enabled
properties.description: Enable Supabase runtime clients. Disabled by default so local starter usage can run without Supabase credentials.

properties.name: nubian.memory.state-pack.store
properties.description: State pack storage backend used by the memory module.

properties.name: nubian.memory.state-pack.table
properties.description: Database table used when nubian.memory.state-pack.store is db.

properties.name: nubian.memory.compaction.max-findings
properties.description: Maximum findings considered before memory compaction is recommended.

properties.name: nubian.artifacts.storage.path
properties.description: Local filesystem root used by artifact storage.

properties.name: nubian.artifacts.metadata.repository
properties.description: Artifact metadata repository backend.

properties.name: nubian.artifacts.metadata.table
properties.description: Database table used when nubian.artifacts.metadata.repository is db.

properties.name: agent.default-model
properties.description: Default model used by agent runs when a request omits a model.

properties.name: agent.max-iterations
properties.description: Maximum number of iterations for an agent run.

properties.name: agent.timeout-seconds
properties.description: Timeout in seconds for agent runs.

properties.name: agent.tool.data.rapid-api-key
properties.description: RapidAPI key used by the built-in data provider tool.

values.description: Use the local development sandbox provider when available.
Use the Docker CLI sandbox provider when available.
Use the Daytona-backed sandbox provider when available.
Use the Firecracker sandbox provider when available.
Use the process-local in-memory state pack store.
Use the configured runtime DBConnection for state pack storage.
Store artifact metadata beside local artifact content.
Store artifact metadata through the runtime DBConnection.
